problem_text: Our company has recently launched a new product, and we want to assess its market performance. Please design a hypothesis test to determine if the average sales of this product exceed a certain benchmark that we have in mind. The test should evaluate the data collected from our sales team over the past three months. Additionally, prepare a report that discusses your method, findings, and any recommendations based on the results. Ensure to highlight any assumptions you make during your analysis and how they might affect your conclusions.
internal_gaps: The specific benchmark for average sales is not provided.
Details on the sales data structure (e.g., sample size, distribution) are missing.
The significance level for the hypothesis test is not specified.
